docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT LANE, MARSHALL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,638.72 FILED BY LEE, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT LANE, MARSHALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LANE, MARSHALL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
